news.headline: MOO Imbalance
Prabhat Kumar, CPA, joins konaAI as VP of Global Internal Audit Solutions, bringing over 20 years of experience.
news.summary: A new VP of Global Internal Audit Solutions, Prabhat Kumar, CPA, has joined konaAI in New York. With over 20 years of experience, his expertise will bolster the company's AI-driven audit strategies.

news.headline: Barnes & Noble Education reveals Q2 FY 2025 financial performance.
Oppenheimer predicts a decrease in interest rates amid economic trends. #finance #news
Hyland appoints Prasenjit Dasgupta as CFO with over 20 years experience. Previous roles at Microsoft and Motorola.
news.summary: Dasgupta, with over 20 years of financial expertise and experience working at companies like Microsoft and Motorola Solutions, has been appointed to a key position at Hyland. The announcement was made in Cleveland on December 9, 2024. Hyland, a pioneer in content innovation cloud technology and a top provider of content management solutions, welcomes Dasgupta to their team to leverage his extensive financial background.

news.headline: US National Security Adviser Sullivan to also discuss developments in Syria, Lebanon and Iran - White House.
US National Security Advisor Sullivan to travel to Israel for Gaza ceasefire talks this week - White House

China will see advancements in automotive smart exteriors by 2024 as trends shift towards electrification and intelligence. The report analyzes market size, content-per-car value, and development trends in this sector.
news.summary: Dublin - ResearchAndMarkets.com has recently included the "Automotive Smart Exteriors Research Report, 2024" in its offerings. The report delves into the potential replacement of traditional automotive exteriors with intelligent ones amidst the shift towards electrification and smart technology. In analyzing the automotive smart exteriors sector, the report examines aspects such as installation, market size, content-per-car value, competitive landscape, suppliers' and OEMs' strategies, and development trends. This comprehensive research provides insights into the growing trend of integrating intelligence into automotive exteriors.

iProov now integrated with Microsoft Entra ID, providing secure workforce access.
NextPlat Corp expects 2024 revenue of over $63 million, showing 70% growth from 2023. (Numbers: $63M, 70%)
news.summary: On December 9, 2024, in Coconut Grove, Florida, the global e-commerce provider NextPlat Corp (NASDAQ: NXPL, NXPLW) revealed that, pending final accounting and auditing processes, it anticipates reporting annual revenue for 2024 that surpasses initial estimates.

news.headline: Talroo introduces Apply Intelligence™ Suite with free AI features, improving job search for candidates and offering value to employers with 1 billion monthly searches.
news.summary: Employers engaged in high-volume hiring can now benefit from advanced technologies such as intelligent resume analysis, AI chatbots, and streamlined application processes. By leveraging Talroo's distinctive audience of more than 1 billion monthly searches, these employers are able to attract better quality and more actively involved candidates. This innovative approach to recruitment is revolutionizing the way high-volume hiring is conducted, ensuring a more efficient and effective process for all involved parties.

news.headline: Matillion named Challenger in 2024 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Data Integration Tools for 2nd year in row.
news.summary: For the second consecutive year, the data integration company headquartered in Denver and Manchester, England, has been acknowledged for its achievements. Matillion, a leading data pipeline platform provider, has received the title of Challenger in the 2024 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Data Integration Tools. This recognition highlights the company's continued success and growth in the industry. It is a prestigious acknowledgment as Gartner® is a highly respected firm known for its thorough evaluations and assessments. Matillion's consistent performance is evident through its placement in this renowned report for the current year.

news.headline: NPower gets $1M grant from Northrop Grumman to enhance tech training for military members, aiding economic mobility.
news.summary: In New York on December 9, 2024, NPower, a prominent tech training nonprofit, announced they had secured a substantial $1 million grant from the Northrop Grumman Foundation. The grant aims to enhance economic mobility for young adults and military-affiliated individuals by supporting them in pursuing tech careers. The grant will be distributed over a period of time to assist in achieving these goals.

news.headline: Veteran trader sees strong bull market for Bitcoin, gold, silver; Brian Russ of 1971 Capital notes Ethereum undervalued.
news.summary: Brian Russ, the chief investment officer at 1971 Capital, believes that Ethereum is currently trading below its intrinsic value. According to Russ, Ethereum's price does not accurately reflect its potential for growth. Additionally, he states that Bitcoin, gold, and silver are experiencing an extended period of bullish market conditions. This suggests that these assets are expected to continue increasing in value over the foreseeable future.

news.headline: 40% of retail injuries occur in the first year, as per Sentry study. Holiday hiring adds thousands of new workers annually.
news.summary: In Stevens Point, Wisconsin, on December 9, 2024, retailers are bringing on board thousands of new employees for the holiday shopping season. The recently published 2024 Retail & Wholesale Injury Report by Sentry highlights a concerning trend. Specifically, it points out that 38% of...

news.headline: LTC Properties, Inc. announces leadership changes: Wendy Simpson as Chair, Pam Kessler and Clint Malin as Co-CEOs, Cece Chikhale as CFO.
news.summary: In Westlake Village, California, LTC Properties, Inc., a real estate investment trust focusing on seniors housing and health care properties, revealed significant leadership changes. Wendy Simpson takes on the role of Executive Chairman of the Board of Directors. Pam Kessler and Clint Malin are now Co-Chief Executive Officers, and Cece Chikhale steps into the position of Chief Financial Officer. These appointments, effective December 3, mark a key part of the Company’s succession plan.NYSE: LTC.

news.headline: Vow ASA reports trade by insiders: Rights issue of 166.7 million shares at NOK 1.50/share.
news.summary: On December 9, 2024, Vow ASA in Oslo announced the start of the subscription period for a rights issue of 166,666,666 new shares at a price of NOK 1.50 per share. This rights issue is fully underwritten. Certain primary insiders and close associates of these insiders have received subscription rights in this offering. The announcement follows the stock exchange communication on November 25, 2024, regarding these details.

news.headline: FreshDirect unveils 2025 food trends focusing on healthier, sustainable, convenient options.
news.summary: In Bronx, NY on December 9, 2024, FreshDirect, a prominent online grocer, revealed its forecasted food trends for 2025. The focus is on healthier, sustainable, and convenient choices as consumer demand evolves. Key highlights include a growing emphasis on nutritious and eco-friendly options, indicating a shift towards more mindful eating habits. This aligns with increasing awareness and interest in sustainable food practices. FreshDirect anticipates significant growth in these areas in the coming year.

news.headline: Ergeon expands nationwide to cover 40% of U.S households; wins Angi Super Service Award for 2024.
news.summary: A technology-driven outdoor living construction company, Ergeon, made a significant announcement on December 9, 2024, revealing its expansion across the nation to cater to 40% of households in the United States. Additionally, the company proudly received the esteemed Angi Super Service Award for the year 2024. This acknowledgment is a testament to Ergeon's dedication to excellence in their services, solidifying their position as a leading player in the industry.

news.headline: Tempus Realty Partners sells $20.3M industrial portfolio in Arkansas, exceeds projections.
news.summary: Tempus Realty Partners, a leading real estate investment partnership based in Arkansas, has recently completed a successful industrial investment comprising of two properties. The total sales generated from this endeavor amounted to $20.3 million. The portfolio consists of two industrial properties.

news.headline: Cytovale's IntelliSep® rapid sepsis detection solution earns recognition for enabling hospitals to save lives and money.
news.summary: A medical diagnostics company, Cytovale®, based in San Francisco, received recognition on Dec. 9, 2024, for their IntelliSep® rapid sepsis detection solution. This technology has been praised for assisting hospitals in both saving lives and reducing costs, all while prioritizing patient-centered care. Cytovale® is dedicated to early detection solutions in the medical field.

news.headline: Nicholas Snow's documentary, "Tinseltown's Queer: 30 Years Later," screened in Santa Clarita, showcasing LGBTQ+ evolution.
news.summary: In Santa Clarita, California on December 9, 2024, Nicholas Snow Productions, LLC revealed plans for the inaugural LA metropolitan screening of "Tinseltown's Queer: 30 Years Later." This remarkable documentary offers a nostalgic exploration of the LGBTQ+ community's development over three decades.

news.headline: SJW Group names Douwe Busschops as new Chief Information Officer, overseeing tech strategies.
Afiniti completes recapitalization with Vista Credit Partners and Resource Group to accelerate growth, solidifying financial foundation.
news.summary: A global customer experience and artificial intelligence provider, Afiniti, Ltd., based in Washington, has recently finalized a recapitalization deal with its secured lenders, primarily Vista Credit Partners, and major shareholder, The Resource Group International Limited. This transaction marks a significant milestone for Afiniti, as it bolsters the company's financial position, positioning it for accelerated growth. The successful completion of this deal opens up new opportunities for Afiniti as it looks towards the future.

news.headline: Bollinger Motors, a Mullen subsidiary, teams up with Broadway Ford Truck Center for sales and service. #partnership #collaboration.
news.summary: A recent report revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.5%, the lowest it has been in the past decade. This decrease represents a significant improvement from the previous year when the unemployment rate was at 6.2%. Additionally, the report highlighted that over 500,000 new jobs were created in the last quarter, contributing to this positive trend in the job market. Experts predict that this trend is likely to continue in the upcoming months, bringing more stability and opportunities for the workforce.

news.headline: Healthcare Integrated Technologies appoints Theo Davies, former Google executive, as Chief Commercial Officer, Nashville, TN.
news.summary: In Nashville, Tennessee on December 9, 2024, Healthcare Integrated Technologies (OTC PINK: HITC), a prominent company specializing in AI-enhanced safety and monitoring systems, has appointed Theo Davies as its Chief Commercial Officer.

news.headline: Artelo Biosciences presents Phase 1 data on ART27.13 showing promising activity with two-thirds showing stabilized weight or reversed weight loss.
news.summary: Results from the first phase of the CAReS trial indicated a positive safety record and encouraging effectiveness of daily administration of ART27.13. Approximately 66% of participants experienced either stabilization or reversal of weight loss within one month of treatment.

news.headline: Dolly Parton donates $1 million to The Salvation Army for food programs, continuing generous legacy.
news.summary: A renowned international celebrity and philanthropist has generously donated $1 million to support crucial food and grocery programs in various local communities nationwide. The donation, announced on December 9, 2024, in Alexandria, Virginia, will have an immediate impact in providing essential assistance to those in need. This significant contribution follows the celebrity's participation in The Salvation Army's 27th annual Red Kettle campaign.

news.headline: 1iO CEO advocates for user control in digital assets at Benzinga conference, emphasizing Web3's drive for data ownership and decentralization.
news.summary: During the Benzinga Future of Digital Assets conference, industry experts delved into the rapidly changing digital landscape, with a specific focus on how Web3 technologies could revolutionize data ownership and decentralization. Key leaders in the sector explored strategies for surmounting technical and regulatory obstacles in order to create systems that empower users and decrease reliance on centralized structures.Markus Kuhnert, the CEO of 1iO, emphasized the core objective of Web3 to grant users autonomy over their data. He highlighted that Web3 aims to eliminate the middleman economy, emphasizing the significance of data and infrastructure ownership. Kuhnert explained that decentralization opens up opportunities for individuals and businesses to reclaim control over their data, enabling them to dictate its usage and storage.Overall, the conference showcased a strong call for data ownership and emphasized the pivotal role that decentralization plays in reshaping the digital landscape. Discussions revolved around empowering individuals and entities to drive the narrative of data utilization, offering more transparency and control in an increasingly digital world.

news.headline: MEDIROM's subsidiary receives orders for 25,000+ MOTHER Bracelet units, including from NFES Technologies Inc.
news.summary: In Tokyo on December 9, 2024, MEDIROM Healthcare Technologies Inc. (NASDAQ: MRM) revealed that its subsidiary, MEDIROM MOTHER Labs Inc., has secured orders for more than 25,000 units of the MOTHER Bracelet. These orders encompass purchases from various entities, including Japanese firms like NFES Technologies Inc.

news.headline: ManpowerGroup appoints David Herranz as Regional President of Southern Europe from January 1, 2025. #LeadershipChanges #ManpowerGroup
news.summary: On December 9, 2024, ManpowerGroup disclosed new leadership changes in Europe, to be implemented from January 1, 2025. David Herranz, currently serving as Senior Vice President and Head of Sales in Europe, will assume the role of Regional President for Southern Europe, except France. ManpowerGroup is listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol MAN.

news.headline: Feast Design Co. acquires Trellis from Mediavine, enhancing opportunities for publishers with site speed updates.
news.summary: Feast Design Co, a leading WordPress solutions provider, has recently made significant upgrades to improve site speed and increase monetization opportunities for content creators. The company, based in New York, revealed on December 9, 2024, that it has acquired Mediavine's site speed-optimized WordPress. This move is aimed at enhancing the user experience and revenue generation potential for clients.

news.headline: Linamar's McLaren Engineering partners with Honda Marine to offer performance outboard engines to OEM builders.
news.summary: A partnership agreement has been established between two renowned brands with rich racing heritage to provide marine performance engines to specific OEM boat builders. This collaboration involves McLaren Engineering, the research and development arm of Linamar Corporation, and aims to power selected popular models with these specialized engines. The agreement signifies a strategic move to combine the expertise and legacy of the two brands in the realm of marine engineering.

news.headline: LogicSource honored in Modern Healthcare's Best in Business 2024 awards for cost savings; leader in procurement services.
news.summary: On December 9, 2024, in Westport, Connecticut, LogicSource, a top provider of procurement services and technology solutions, was recognized in Modern Healthcare's 2024 Best in Business awards. This prestigious award highlights LogicSource's exceptional accomplishment in generating cost savings.

news.headline: Matea Gold, formerly of The Washington Post, will serve as Washington Editor at The New York Times.
news.summary: The recent departure of Ms. Gold, a managing editor at The Washington Post, adds to a string of high-profile exits from the publication.

news.headline: TikTok files an emergency motion to block, divest, or ban the law.
SEI and Phillies team up for mural at Citizens Bank Park, local artists invited to submit by Feb 14, 2025. (Characters: 107)
news.summary: A new mural in Philadelphia highlights a joint dedication to the community, calling on local artists to submit their ideas by February 14, 2025. The initiative, a collaboration between SEI® and the Philadelphia Phillies, marks the second year of the contest. The announcement was made on December 9, 2024, in Oaks, Pennsylvania. SEI® (NASDAQ: SEIC) and the Phillies are inviting artists to contribute to this community project.

news.headline: Coreshell unveils first commercial-scale 60 Ah battery cells using domestic silicon, to deliver to automakers in 2025.
news.summary: A battery technology company based in San Leandro, California, called Coreshell, has revealed that they will be supplying global automakers with 60 Ah battery cells in the year 2025. These battery cells are unique as they are the first in the electric vehicle (EV) industry to be produced at a commercial scale and are made using an anode that is 100 percent efficient. This development signals a significant advancement in EV battery technology and is expected to have a notable impact on the automotive industry.

news.headline: Groundbreaking national AI cancer screening program in NSW welcomes Lunit to assist in reading 31,000 mammography exams annually.
news.summary: Lunit INSIGHT MMG has been incorporated into the clinical operations at BreastScreen New South Wales in Australia to aid in the interpretation of about 31,000 mammography examinations each year. This integration marks a significant step in enhancing diagnostic processes and patient care at the facility. This advancement was made by Lunit, a prominent company specializing in AI-driven technologies, headquartered in Seoul, South Korea. The platform is designed to assist healthcare professionals in providing accurate and efficient readings of mammograms, contributing to improved outcomes for patients undergoing breast cancer screenings.

news.headline: Caterpillar's third Global Operator Challenge attracts operators from 40+ countries in the largest challenge yet.
news.summary: Operators of heavy equipment from over 40 countries are vying for the world title in the largest competition ever held. Caterpillar Inc. announced on December 9, 2024, the start of its third Global Operator Challenge, with participation from thousands of operators around the globe. This event marks an unprecedented scale and is a significant milestone for Caterpillar Inc. Stocks for the company are publicly traded on the New York Stock Exchange under the symbol CAT.

news.headline: Telluride SUV named to Car and Driver's 2025 10Best Trucks and SUVs for 6th year in a row.达Since launch, 6 consecutive titles.
news.summary: In a remarkable feat of consistency, the Telluride SUV has secured its sixth consecutive title since its debut, setting a new record. The 2025 model has recently been recognized by Car and Driver's 2025 10Best Trucks and SUVs list, emphasizing its rugged qualities. This achievement underscores the vehicle's ongoing popularity and performance, solidifying its place in the market. This success story highlights the exceptional run of the Telluride, showcasing its sustained appeal and desirability to consumers.

news.headline: Sumitomo Pharma presents promising data on Nuvisertib and Enzomenib at 2024 ASH meeting for blood cancers. #NewTreatments #Phase1/2Studies
news.summary: The most recent findings from Phase 1/2 trials demonstrate potential for two experimental therapies in treating patients dealing with recurring or resistant blood and bone marrow cancers. Nuvisertib (TP-3654), an oral small molecule designed to specifically target PIM1 kinase, is currently under assessment in a Phase 1/2 clinical study. The results suggest a glimpse of hope for patients facing challenges with these types of cancers.

news.headline: European Zadarma acquires US VoIP provider VoIPVoIP, enhancing services for US customers. 100% ownership finalized.
news.summary: One of the top European VoIP providers, Zadarma, has recently acquired full ownership of VoIPVoIP, a notable VoIP operator in the USA. This significant acquisition marked on December 9, 2024, is part of Zadarma's global expansion strategy to enhance services for U.S. customers. The deal ensures Zadarma's control of 100% of VoIPVoIP's operations and customer base, strengthening its presence in the American market. This move is set to bring advanced VoIP services to a larger customer base, solidifying Zadarma's position as a key player in the telecommunications industry.
